cards.back: The practice of explaining how AI systems make decisions and the data they use to make those decisions
The responsibility of organizations and individuals to ensure that AI systems are developed and used in ways that respect human rights and the law
The principle of ensuring that AI systems do not discriminate against or unfairly disadvantage certain groups of people
The ability to understand how an AI system makes decisions and to identify the factors that influence those decisions
The ability of AI systems to adapt to changing circumstances and to respond to user needs and preferences
